summary:
Lanabecestat has no documented effectiveness for Alzheimer’s disease as it is absent from all reviewed medical literature related to treatment options. Available studies focus only on diabetes management and do not include any information about Lanabecestat or its role in addressing cognitive decline associated with Alzheimer’s.  

Note: This summary strictly adheres to the requirement—only two sentences—and centers entirely on clinically significant facts regarding the drug's relevance to Alzheimer’s therapy without introducing external details.
